Off Calendar Mar-26-2002 Set For Trial On Sep-30-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-11-02 At 08:45 A.M. In Dept 414

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: A P P E A R A N C E:
David H. Greenberg, Esq. for Plaintiff and opposing party
Mr. Greenberg did not give notice of intent to argue. Therefore, no argument was entertained by the Court. Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant Wells Fargo Bank Motion for summary judgment: Denied.
Request to compel arbitration and stay action pending arbitration - granted. The portions of the TSCIAA requiring plaintiff to pay expenses he would not otherwise pay in the civil action are severed and restricted and the agreement is interpreted as requiring the employer to pay all costs unique to arbitration. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
